day_1: ^: Our story begins in the suburbs outside Melios City.
^: Several years ago, an accident occurred in the once-bustling social hub known as the Nucleus.

^: The Nucleus was a public park beloved by the local residents. For a long time, folks flocked to the Nucleus for downtime and relaxation. Students burned time here after school. Concerts took place. Some even held weddings here.

^: Regardless, what happened on that day left an enduring mark on the community. While business had to continue as usual, the Nucleus' identity was tainted. Upkeep and preservation became less of a priority. Soon enough, the events that transpired faded into local legend.
^: Even so, one individual continues to appreciate the now-quiet walls of the Nucleus community center...
